specific_mechanism: White-rot fungi degrade recalcitrant pollutants (PAHs, dioxins) via extracellular ligninolytic peroxidases; non-specific enzymes attack diverse substrates over weeks
llm_application: LLM long-horizon reasoning via non-specific iterative degradation of hard problems: extracellular 'enzyme' analog = test-time tool use producing intermediate hypotheses over many steps.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes specific-mycology adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
